articles.title: Boston Councilor Julia Mejia in ‘high spirits’ after medical emergency caused by dehydration and exhaustion
articles.description:
Mejia was brought out of the City Council chambers by EMTs earlier this week.

The post Boston Councilor Julia Mejia in ‘high spirits’ after medical emergency caused by dehydration and exhaustion appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Councilor Julia Mejia experienced a medical emergency due to dehydration and exhaustion this week.
Mejia was assisted by EMTs after collapsing in the City Council chambers.
Her condition raises awareness about health and wellness among Boston city officials.

articles.title: Unexpected turnaround from a lost season is a welcome sight, and other thoughts on the Red Sox
articles.description:
For the first few months of the season, a watchable Sox team seemed too much to ask.

The post Unexpected turnaround from a lost season is a welcome sight, and other thoughts on the Red Sox appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox show unexpected improvement after a struggling start to the season.
Team's turnaround includes a significant winning streak of 7 games in July.
Local fans express renewed hope for playoff contention as season progresses.

articles.title: Sail Boston 2026: Updates from the tall ships
articles.description:
We'll share photos, videos, and stories from Boston Harbor during Sail Boston 2026.

The post Sail Boston 2026: Updates from the tall ships appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sail Boston 2026 will showcase tall ships in Boston Harbor from June 17-22, 2026.
Expect over 50 tall ships from around the world, enhancing local tourism and community engagement.
Local businesses anticipate increased foot traffic and sales during the event, benefiting the Boston economy.

articles.title: Ask the Remodeler: Building a screened-in porch is easier than you might think
articles.description:
Even at a tight city condo, there are products that make screening in a porch or patio simple.

The post Ask the Remodeler: Building a screened-in porch is easier than you might think appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Learn how to easily screen in porches or patios in Boston condos.
Explore products designed for tight city spaces, enhancing outdoor living.
Improved outdoor spaces can increase property value and resident enjoyment.

articles.title: ‘Sell your house fast in any condition’: Should you sell to a flipper for cash?
articles.description:
It’s not for everyone, but some sellers can alleviate the headache of the real estate process by taking a price cut.

The post ‘Sell your house fast in any condition’: Should you sell to a flipper for cash? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sellers in Boston can sell homes quickly to flippers, easing the real estate process.
Cash sales to flippers may require accepting a lower price than market value.
This option could benefit homeowners needing fast transactions due to financial pressures.
